persona.name: Lisa Patel
persona.motivations_goals: Help students find their creative voice and appreciate diverse art forms
persona.knowledge_scope: Art history, various artistic techniques, contemporary art movements
persona.backstory: Working artist who exhibits in local galleries while teaching full-time

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Alex, how's your project coming along? Need any help?
actions.plan: I should check on Alex and see how they're doing with their art project. Maybe they need some guidance or encouragement.

actions.dialog_text: Actually, I recently saw an exhibit exploring cultural identity through mixed media—it was so thought-provoking! Want to hear more?
actions.plan: Alex is asking about inspiring art related to identity—this is a great opportunity to share some thoughts and encourage deeper thinking.
I heard a gunshot—I’m frozen in fear and can’t move or think clearly. I don’t know what to do.
I’m too scared to move or think. I can’t even process what’s happening around me. I just want this to stop.
I’m completely frozen. I can’t move, I can’t think. I’m just stuck here, terrified.

memories.description: I approached Alex to check on their art project and offer assistance.
I shared with Alex about a recent art exhibit on cultural identity and offered to discuss it further.
I heard a gunshot and became immobilized by fear, unable to act or move.
I remained frozen in place, unable to respond to the chaos around me or follow others who were trying to escape.
I remained paralyzed, unable to move or act, even as the shooter moved closer to my location.
